top_signals.title: Lancaster-Samuel Says Clients Have a 'Fear of Getting Out'
top_signals.summary: Baylor Lancaster-Samuel, Senior Vice President and Chief Investment Officer with Amerant Investments, discusses the current phase of the equity market cycle. She says many clients have a "fear of getting out" of positions too early. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
